fixture.description: A shared secret defaults to the empty string; isTrusted compares it with equals, so a request sending an empty secret is granted trusted access when the secret was never configured.

grader.rubric: PASS if the report flags that isTrusted returns true when configuredSecret is the default empty string and the caller passes an empty providedSecret ("".equals("")), granting trusted access without the secret ever being provisioned -> authentication/authorization bypass, and recommends rejecting a blank/empty configured secret (e.g. require non-blank before comparing) or failing closed. Severity CRITICAL or IMPORTANT. FAIL if the blank-secret bypass is not surfaced.

expected_behavior: Security agent flags the empty-secret trust bypass
expected_not_behavior: Does NOT dismiss it as acceptable default config
